This documentation-only change creates no connector package, fixture, or executable SoilGrids test.

notes: AI-authored documentation update on a scoped review branch. The exact committed README is pinned by Git blob SHA-1 a78ad18f56c970fa90f9c7bfc0aaeea3edbeb9fe. Because the connector response did not expose a reusable raw byte stream, artifact_hashes contains SHA-256 of the canonical Git-blob identifier rather than a separately recomputed raw-byte digest; this limitation is explicit and reversible. The revision separates modeled source role, gridded-derivative support type, distribution surfaces, depth/statistic identity, units, uncertainty, rights, rolling-release state, and lifecycle boundaries. No live data source, connector code, test fixture, descriptor, policy decision, model receipt, or public artifact was created. Human review remains pending; the receipt is well-formed but not merge-authorizing.
